---
title: "index.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\index.ts"
loc: 157
complexity: 21
logic_score: 0.95
style_score: 3.91
intel_score: 7.35
overall_score: 3.89
---

## Intent
The `index.ts` module serves as the primary orchestration hub for Operation PennyOne. It coordinates the multi-phase scanning process—including chronicle ingestion, semantic symbol indexing, structural analysis, and intelligence (intent) generation—to compile the global repository matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Invoke the `runScan` function to perform a full repository analysis, or `indexSector` for a surgical, incremental update to a specific file. These functions update both the SQLite database (Mimir's Well) and the 3D visualization data.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 55 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [crawlRepository](file://./crawler.ts)
- [analyzeFile](file://./analyzer.ts)
- [FileData](file://./analyzer.ts)
- [writeReport](file://./intel/writer.ts)
- [compileMatrix](file://./intel/compiler.ts)
- [CompiledGraph](file://./intel/compiler.ts)
- [registerSpoke](file://./intel/database.ts)
- [updateFtsIndex](file://./intel/database.ts)
- [SemanticIndexer](file://./intel/semantic.ts)
- [ChronicleIndexer](file://./intel/chronicle.ts)
- [Warden](file://./intel/warden.ts)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)
- [*](file://node:crypto)
- [registry](file://./pathRegistry.ts)
- [activePersona](file://./personaRegistry.ts)
- [ScanResult](file://./types.ts)
- [defaultProvider](file://./intel/llm.ts)
- [*](file://chalk)

### Exports
- `indexSector`
- `indexSector`
- `absolutePath`
- `normalizedPath`
- `code`
- `currentHash`
- `data`
- `indexer`
- `semanticGraph`
- `semanticData`
- `defaultProvider`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `raw`
- `graph`
- `index`
- `runScan`
- `runScan`
- `chronicles`
- `indexer`
- `semanticGraph`
- `files`
- `analyzedFiles`
- `existingGraph`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `raw`
- `hashMap`
- `data`
- `code`
- `currentHash`
- `normalizedPath`
- `semanticData`
- `existing`
- `data`
- `filesNeedingIntent`
- `BATCH_SIZE`
- `i`
- `batch`
- `batchNum`
- `totalBatches`
- `batchIntents`
- `j`
- `intentData`
- `fileData`
- `writeReport`
- `finalResults`
- `graphPath`
- `raw`
- `graph`
- `warden`
